---
title: "Summary of Our Work"
format: 
    revealjs:
        theme: serif
---

## Data Scraping

- We scraped posts from 54 subreddits, including all the states and the subreddits of the Democrats and Republicans.

- In total, we have text data of 27000 posts, from which we analysed, mainly using BERTopic, a package mainly used for topic modelling.
---

## Analysis



---

## Conclusion
::: {.incremental}
- What makes these [red]{style="color:red;font-weight:bold;"} and [blue]{style="color:blue;font-weight:bold;"} states vote for their parties ?

- What makes these [purple]{style="color:purple;font-weight:bold;"} states change their dominant votes ?

- Our plan is to analyse people's political speeches and opinions of every state and see the most common words, a ***"Buzzword"***

- Defining a **buzzword**: "tba"

:::

---

## Data Collection {transition="fade-in slide-out"}
::: {.incremental}

- What parts of Reddit / Twitter we plan on scraping
- Number of posts/ comments/ shares

- Our plan to integrate / merge the data (expand here from last week's lecture)

:::

---

## Data Visualisation {auto-animate=true auto-animate-easing="ease-in-out"}

- Exploratory / Primary Analysis
- Variables to compare etc

::: {.r-hstack}
::: {data-id="box1" auto-animate-delay="0" style="background: #0000FF; width: 200px; height: 150px; margin: 10px;"}
:::

::: {data-id="box2" auto-animate-delay="0.1" style="background: #FF0000; width: 200px; height: 150px; margin: 10px;"}
:::

:::

---

## Data Visualisation {auto-animate=true auto-animate-easing="ease-in-out"}

- Exploratory / Primary Analysis
- Variables to compare etc

::: {.r-stack}
::: {data-id="box1" style="background: #FF0000; width: 350px; height: 350px; border-radius: 200px;"}
:::

::: {data-id="box2" style="background: #0000FF; width: 250px; height: 250px; border-radius: 200px;"}
:::

:::

--- 

## The website {auto-animate=true auto-animate-easing="ease-in-out"}

- Exploratory / Primary Analysis
- Variables to compare etc

::: {.r-stack}
::: {data-id="box1" style="background: #FF0000; width: 350px; height: 350px; border-radius: 200px;"}
:::

::: {data-id="box2" style="background: #0000FF; width: 250px; height: 250px; border-radius: 200px;"}
:::

:::

---
 
## Interactive Map {transition="fade-in slide-out"}
::: {.incremental}
 
- Google Maps API
- HTML and CSS code for the map
- Data inputed the 'buzzword dateframe'
 
:::
 
---
 
## Interactive Map {transition="fade-in slide-out"}
::: {.incremental}
 
- Hoover/ click on the map
    - Social media data
<![](/pictures/Red-BlueStates-03.jpeg){fig-align="center"}
 

:::
 
---
 
## Census Data {transition="fade-in slide-out"}
::: {.incremental}
 
- Compare predictions with presidential election results
<![](/pictures/censusimg.jpeg){fig-align="center"}
 

:::
 

---
 
## Generative AI {transition="fade-in slide-out"}
::: {.incremental}
 
<![](/pictures/chatgptimg.jpeg){fig-align="center"}
 

:::
